title: Start
body: Albert Tsai: So... Was there any response? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Don't think so. ->What? Albert Tsai: Hm? Weren't you gonna go get somebody? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手) >> Albert Tsai: We've been awake for a while. No one's come to check up on us. Albert Tsai: The door's locked, so we can't get out either. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手倒播) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why are we locked in? Albert Tsai: That's what I want to know. <<#GoTo(@車禍醒來就在這鬼醫院啦)>> ->I don't get it. Where are we? Albert Tsai: Don't know, some hospital up in Northbay. <<@車禍醒來就在這鬼醫院啦>> Albert Tsai: I woke up here after that accident we had. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看) >> Albert Tsai: I have no idea what went and it hurts everywhere... Albert Tsai: But when I woke up, you were already up for a while, boss. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >> <<#Simple(3)>> ->Boss who? Me? Albert Tsai: Who else? Albert Tsai: The boss of the biggest smuggling gang in town: Ivan Zhang! Thought: This kid knows how to talk... <<#Simple(3)>> ->You're quite the smooth-talker. Albert Tsai: Of course! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_比讚) >> Albert Tsai: It's an important skill to have when working with you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: So? What do we do? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >> Albert Tsai: Do you think we were arrested? Thought: His voice is getting stiff. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >> Thought: He's not that good at hiding his nervousness. ;<< Play (張延安, MBU_老張_抱胸) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Arrested? But we're in a hospital. Albert Tsai: Well we did get into an accident! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >> Albert Tsai: They're not gonna drag me into the interrogation room without fixing me up first. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾抬手) >> Albert Tsai: Cops are supposed to be civilized people. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾抬手倒播) >> Albert Tsai: How are you feeling? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >> Albert Tsai: Are you really not hurt? How is that possible? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I feel fine right now. Albert Tsai: Hah! You've got some amazing luck! Albert Tsai: Unlike me, in this damn...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >> Albert Tsai: Sigh... That doesn't even feel like my leg. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Can you still move? Albert Tsai: Only if you count crawling as a form of movement. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >> <<#Simple(3)>> ->Well how fast can you crawl? Albert Tsai: Probably faster than you, old man. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >> Albert Tsai: Hahaha! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >> Albert Tsai: It's fine. If we have to run, I think I'll manage. Albert Tsai: You don't need to worry about that. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Do your legs hurt? Albert Tsai: Hurts like hell. Albert Tsai: You're the one that needs to be examined. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >> Albert Tsai: We went from 50 to 0 and you look like you just walked out of it completely unharmed. <<#EndSimple>> ->So did you want me to be injured like you? Albert Tsai: I'm not that wicked. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >> Albert Tsai: What, I got hurt so others gotta be hurt too? Albert Tsai: I'd be down if you wanted to trade places though, haha! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >> <<#EndSimple>> ->What are you so anxious about? Albert Tsai: Anxious? A-am I? Albert Tsai: Maybe a little. I'm still confused as to what's going on...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看) >> Albert Tsai: All I know is that I woke up hurting all over. Albert Tsai: Shit... Still can't move my legs. Thought: He's starting to panic. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >> <<#Simple(4)>> ->Calm down, let's get oriented. Albert Tsai: Hmm, got it. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >> Albert Tsai: Sorry, I can take care of myself. It's fine, it's fine. ->Is that all? Albert Tsai: Of course, what else could it be? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >> Albert Tsai: Why are you acting so suspicious? Albert Tsai: I can take care of myself. It's fine, it's fine. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: I just want to get to the bottom of this as soon as possible. <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: So what do you think? Albert Tsai: Do you think we've been arrested? ;<< Play (張延安, MBU_老張_抱胸倒播) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I still don't understand why you'd think that. Albert Tsai: Uh, because the cops were literally on our tail? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬頭) >> Albert Tsai: What's wrong, you've been kind of out of it. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬頭倒播) >> <<@是車禍撞到頭啊>> Albert Tsai: Is this because of the crash? Did you get a concussion? <<#Simple(5)>> ->You're saying I have brain problems? Albert Tsai: Hey, I'm just looking out for you. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_比一) >> Albert Tsai: No need to be so high-strung. ->You're the one with the concussion. Albert Tsai: I won't deny that. Albert Tsai: I've been feeling dizzy this whole time. God knows when it'll stop. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Perhaps. Albert Tsai: Huh? Perhaps? Albert Tsai: That doesn't sound like what you'd normally say. Thought: He's right. It doesn't. <<#GoTo(@是車禍撞到頭啊)>> <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >> Albert Tsai: I can't remember what happened in between either. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->How much can you recall? Albert Tsai: A little bit, but it's kind of a blur. Albert Tsai: What about you? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >> <<@不如你說一下你還記得的事情>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why don't you tell me what you know? Albert Tsai: Sure, will do. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >> <<#GoTo(@阿翰開始回憶)>> ->I need some clues to help me piece things together. Albert Tsai: Clues? Albert Tsai: Let me think... <<#EndSimple>> ->My memory's also pretty blurry. Albert Tsai: This is tough...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >> <<#GoTo(@不如你說一下你還記得的事情)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@阿翰開始回憶>> Albert Tsai: ... Albert Tsai: We met up with Ah-Chang at the docks at 4 AM. He said he had a package for us that he smuggled out of Sunrise's labs. <<#Simple(5)>> ->What was in the package? Albert Tsai: It was some kind of liquid weapon. That's all he wanted to reveal. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考) >> Albert Tsai: If we wanted to buy, we had to meet him face-to-face. Albert Tsai: But I should be the one asking that question. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考倒播) >> Albert Tsai: You were the one who verified the contents. I was only responsible for moving the goods. Albert Tsai: You never told us anything about it. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >> Albert Tsai: I don't think they'd cheat us though. After all, my brother Alex was the one who introduced us. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >> Albert Tsai: Otherwise, this trade would never have happened. What do you think? ->Who's Ah-Chang? Albert Tsai: The broker my brother introduced. He's got an in with the big corporations. Albert Tsai: This was supposed to be our second transaction, but I have the feeling you still don't trust him. Albert Tsai: I get that though. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考) >> Albert Tsai: He kind of has... an untrustworthy face. Albert Tsai: ...But I think I can trust him because Alex trusts him. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考倒播) >> Albert Tsai: You clearly trusted him enough, otherwise we wouldn't have gone, right? Albert Tsai: I still don't know what the contents are though. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >> Albert Tsai: That whole transaction was unusually secretive. You didn't even want to disclose anything to me. Albert Tsai: Sigh... Sometimes your excessive caution can really hurt my feelings. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: So in the end, it was a successful transaction. Ah-Chang gave us the goods, we gave him the money. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看) >> Albert Tsai: I did all the appropriate preparations to secure the package, and we were off. Albert Tsai: But a couple minutes after we pulled away, things started going nuts. Albert Tsai: The cops just started shooting at us. There were no sirens, no blockades, not even a fucking warning. Albert Tsai: I fired back but my right arm got hit. Alex tried to intercept their comms, but there was nothing on the comms, only static. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >> Albert Tsai: That was when you... I...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >> Albert Tsai: ... Albert Tsai: Shit, that's when my memories blacked out. Thought: I threw off the cops by making them think we went on the highway. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >> <<#Simple(3)>> ->I managed to throw them off our tail. Albert Tsai: Yeah! Yeah! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_比一) >> Albert Tsai: Hah! That was great, you got them to chase the wrong car. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: ...And then we were safe again. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬頭) >> Albert Tsai: We weren't being followed and our injuries weren't serious. Albert Tsai: We never checked the car so I don't know...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬頭倒播) >> Albert Tsai: Because then, we suddenly lost control of the engine and the steering wheel. Albert Tsai: And then bang! We hit a pillar. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >> Albert Tsai: After that, we woke up here. Albert Tsai: A fine young man and an old geezer, left with nothing to do but stare at each other. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >> Thought: This kid's just shooting his mouth off. <<#Simple(3)>> ->You've got a lot of guts to talk like that. Albert Tsai: That's because I trust you to be a bigger man. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >> Albert Tsai: You wouldn't get mad over a tiny comment, right? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->That's correct. Albert Tsai: Thanks. I knew you were cool. <<#Simple(3)>> ->This old geezer is gonna show you what a real geezer is like. Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後傾) >> Albert Tsai: I'm sorry. I know my place. Albert Tsai: Just please stop talking like that. It's unnerving. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後傾倒播) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Go on, keep talking like that and you'll find out. Albert Tsai: No, please accept my apologies. Albert Tsai: It was careless of me to speak out of turn. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >> Albert Tsai: As a lackey, I must do my utmost to not stray above my station. Thought: Kid's got wit.;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: Well, that's all I remember about it. <<#Simple(3)>> ->Wait, what happened to your brother, Alex? Albert Tsai: Huh? Didn't you just tell me he was in another ward? Albert Tsai: Look, I think it says on that screen. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手) >> Albert Tsai: I can't quite see what's on it, but it's what you told me. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手倒播) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: That's why I thought the three of us were already arrested. Albert Tsai: They were just waiting for us to heal so they could interrogate us. Albert Tsai: The hospital database is connected to the government's so they probably know our identities even if they weren't notified. <<#Simple(6)>> ->They might not have checked our IDs yet. Albert Tsai: That's... hard to imagine. Albert Tsai: I'm pretty sure they ID patients first so they can contact their families. ->The cops might not know who they're chasing. Albert Tsai: That's... possible. Albert Tsai: We never showed our faces, so they could only ID the car. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考) >> Albert Tsai: If we were brought in as just people from a traffic accident, it's definitely possible that we haven't been arrested. Albert Tsai: ... Albert Tsai: Okay, I might have been too much of a pessimist. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考倒播) >> Albert Tsai: ...But it's better to be careful, right? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: He's being a lot more careful than usual. Is he still hung up on something? Albert Tsai: We still have one important thing we need to do, regardless of the arrest situation. Albert Tsai: We need to leave this damn ward. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看) >> Albert Tsai: We've been awake for half an hour now. No doctor or nurse has come to check on us. Albert Tsai: I don't know what this means, but I don't think we should just sit and wait. Albert Tsai: ... Thought: He's on edge, but he doesn't even realize it. Thought: I get it. He's not worried about himself. He's worried about his brother. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >> <<#Simple(4)>> ->Are you worried about Alex? Albert Tsai: A bit. Albert Tsai: I want to see him, to make sure he's okay. ->We'll all be okay, Albert. Albert Tsai: Mm, got it. Albert Tsai: It's just... I want to know for sure as soon as I can. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Albert Tsai: No one responded after you knocked the door, so I don't think there's anyone out there at the moment. ;<< Play (張延安, MBU_老張_看外) >> Albert Tsai: That's probably a good thing. At least we won't get mobbed and interrogated the moment the doors open. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >> Albert Tsai: So... What should we do now? Thought: We should start with the lock. ;<< Play (張延安, MBU_老張_看外倒播) >> ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >> <<#If($INV_DoorLock = 0)>> Thought: But I checked, it can't be picked or busted. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Well, the lock's out of the question. ($INV_DoorLock) ->The problem is, that lock is unbreakable. ($INV_DoorLock) <<#GoTo(@這到底什麼軍用級門鎖喔喔喔)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Let's start with the lock on the door. Albert Tsai: Oh! You're right. Albert Tsai: Good call! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_比讚) >> Thought: Of course that was a good call. Thought: Hospital locks shouldn't be too difficult to work with. Thought: This should be a piece of cake. <<#End>> ->I think we should wait and see what happens. Albert Tsai: That's the last thing we should be doing! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >> Albert Tsai: Even if the cops haven't caught up with us, it'll only be a matter of time. Albert Tsai: That car is still out there. It won't be hard for them to sniff out our trail. Albert Tsai: What would we even be waiting for? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->...For someone to open the door. Albert Tsai: ... Albert Tsai: You're not normally this passive. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >> Thought: I'm not normally like this. Albert Tsai: ...Let's just go with what you want. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >> Albert Tsai: I'm stuck in bed anyways. ->Making too much noise could attract attention. Albert Tsai: I'm not talking about blowing up the lock with C4. Albert Tsai: ... Albert Tsai: Just... gently pick it. Like, hot-wire it. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >> Albert Tsai: I don't think this old dingy hospital has that sophisticated a security system. Albert Tsai: *Sigh* It's all up to you.;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >> Albert Tsai: I'm stuck in bed anyways. <<#EndSimple>> Thought: What am I thinking? Just break the lock and open the door. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> //以下沒內容 //以下沒內容 //以下沒內容 //以下沒內容 //以下沒內容

title: 調查到門鎖後
body:
//調查過門鎖才能主動進行的對話
<<@門鎖怎麼樣了？>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Busting the lock isn't an option.
->Lock's no good, we gotta think of something else.
    <<@這到底什麼軍用級門鎖喔喔喔>>
    Albert Tsai: Why?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Do you happen to hide a power drill in your pants? ($INV_DoorLock)
        Albert Tsai: No.
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Okay, then I can't open the door.
        ->Then that's that.
            Albert Tsai: Huh?
            Albert Tsai: What do you mean? It's not like it's a military lock, why would you need a...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手) >>
            Albert Tsai: ...
            Albert Tsai: It's a military lock, isn't it? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手倒播) >>
            Albert Tsai: Fuck...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->It's a military lock.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#GoTo(@可是怎麼可能用軍規的鎖)>>
->Hey, I found some papers next to the door. ($INV_Paper)
    Albert Tsai: Oh, yeah.
    Albert Tsai: You said you found those under your bed.
    Albert Tsai: You looked pretty flustered when you were going through those.
    Albert Tsai: Something about how there's a problem, and the time being all wrong. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >>
    Albert Tsai: You never explained yourself but you were yelling and pounding the door.
    Albert Tsai: So? What did it say? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->It's always night in here.
        Albert Tsai: We've only been awake for the past half-hour, right?
        Albert Tsai: That doesn't sound that unusual.
    ->Don't forget those notes under the bed.
        Albert Tsai: Under the bed?
        Albert Tsai: You did find those under your bed alright.
        Albert Tsai: What's that supposed to mean?
        Albert Tsai: Did you find more under my bed, too?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Albert Tsai: Ahh, forget about it! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後躺) >>
    Albert Tsai: Who knows, maybe this used to be a psycho ward and some nutjob left those.
    Albert Tsai: We shouldn't be dwelling on these notes. We should be finding a way out.
    Albert Tsai: How's it going with the lock? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後躺倒播) >>
    <<#Set($INV_Paper, -1)>>
    <<#GoTo(@門鎖怎麼樣了？)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>
 
 
<<@可是怎麼可能用軍規的鎖>>
Albert Tsai: You've got to be kidding me! ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >>
Albert Tsai: Why would this local hospital use military locks?
Albert Tsai: Is that where my hospital donations are going? No wonder they're always doing charity drives. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾抬手) >>
Albert Tsai: I don't get it...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾抬手倒播) >>
Albert Tsai: Ahh, okay. At least we know that won't work. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >>
 
<<#If($UsePanelFirst = true)>>
Albert Tsai: We'll just have to guess the password.
Albert Tsai: See that machine back there you were using? ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭) >>
Albert Tsai: It'd be nice if we could somehow get the login information. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭倒播) >>
<<#GoTo(@什麼方法可以找到密碼)>>
<<#EndIf>>
 
 
<<Set($UsePanelFirst, true)>>
Albert Tsai: We're left with two options: Look for a key card that someone might have left behind or...
Albert Tsai: ...Just guess the password to the control panel.
<<#Simple(3)>>
->The control panel?
    Albert Tsai: Uh-huh. The one back here. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭) >>
    Albert Tsai: It should control most of the electronics in the room.
    Albert Tsai: The IV drips, air conditioning, and of course, even the door. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭倒播) >>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<@什麼方法可以找到密碼>>
Albert Tsai: That being said, I don't think we're gonna get anywhere by just guessing.
Albert Tsai: It only allows so many failed login attempts. We mess this up, we'll be out of options.
Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考) >>
Albert Tsai: Hm... You could try looking for some sticky notes or something similar.
Albert Tsai: I spent a lot of time at old hospitals like this while taking care of Alex.
Thought: Taking care of Alex? I didn't know about this.
Thought: He rarely speaks about his family. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考倒播) >>
<<#Simple(3)>>
->What did you mean by taking care of Alex?
    Albert Tsai: I was literally taking care of him.
    Albert Tsai: He's been frail and sick since he was a child, so he spent a lot of time at the hospital. ;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看) >>
    Albert Tsai: I was his only family, so I had to take care of him.
    Thought: Albert... I...;<< Play (蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Albert Tsai: The nurses there would always write the password to the controls somewhere, in case they forgot.
Albert Tsai: It's worth a shot. Otherwise we'll just be stuck here for sure.
 
<<#If($INV_PassWordHint = 0)>>
Thought: Hm? Doesn't that mean...
Thought: Those notes I saw on the cabinet, are they supposed to be password hints?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I did find something. ($INV_PassWordHint)
->Bingo, you were right. ($INV_PassWordHint)
    <<#GoTo(@這到底什麼密碼提示喔喔喔)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>
 
<<#End>>

title: 調查鎖頭的時候用病房控制器
body:
<<#If($UsePanelFirst = false)>>
<<Set($UsePanelFirst, true)>>
<<PlayUntil (張延安, MBU_老張_按按鈕起始)>>
Control Panel: Hello, welcome to the Ward Management System.
Albert Tsai: Hm? What are you doing?
Albert Tsai: Oh! That was smart! This should be able to open the door.
Albert Tsai: But...
Control Panel: Please enter the password. For assistance, ask any nearby staff.

title: 讓阿翰冷靜起始
body:

Albert Tsai: Uh... I... ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >>

<<#Simple(99999)>>

    <<Set($IsAhanFaint,0)>>

    ->You don't seem to have fully recovered yet.
        Albert Tsai: Yeah, that seems about right.
        Albert Tsai: At least I'm conscious.
    ->It'll get better after a while.
        Albert Tsai: Mmh. I shouldn't be too worried about it.
    ->...

    Albert Tsai: But I have this splitting headache... Damn...
<<#EndSimple>>
Albert Tsai: My memories are a mess. I can't remember anything clearly. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >>
Albert Tsai: Ask me something. Might kickstart my memories.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Where did we stash the package?
    Albert Tsai: Uh... It's probably not a good time to ask about that?
    Thought: His eyes wandered. I've seen that expression before. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看) >>
    Thought: He feels guilty, but why?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Why not?
        Albert Tsai: Your rules. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >>
        <<@問這個不太好>>
        Albert Tsai: Remember? The rules all of us had to memorize? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >>
        Albert Tsai: Unless it's absolutely necessary, exchanging sensitive information is forbidden until we're all safe. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Absolutely necessary? What does that mean?
            Albert Tsai: Hey, they're your rules. Why are you asking me.
            <<#Simple(3)>>
            ->You asked me to ask you a question.
                Albert Tsai: Yeah, any other question would've been fine.
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Albert Tsai: It's only necessary when a team member is in grave danger. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >>
            Albert Tsai: For example, if one of our own gets arrested, that information could be used to bail them out. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >>
            Albert Tsai: Family first, business second, that's what you told us.
        ->When can we say that we're all safe?
            Albert Tsai: It's not that difficult to understand. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >>
            Albert Tsai: When we're all home, lying on the sofa, browsing our phones...
            Albert Tsai: Then we're safe. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >>
            <<#Simple(3)>>
            ->All you're missing is your phone.
                Albert Tsai: Yep! Hahaha! ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_比一) >>
                Albert Tsai: But this isn't home.
                Albert Tsai: Anyone could come in at any moment, so I don't really consider this a safe situation.
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Albert Tsai: Sorry, I can't answer that question.
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->I'll ask another one.
        Albert Tsai: Sure. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Are you hiding something?
            Albert Tsai: Hiding? No. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後傾) >>
            Albert Tsai: Unless you meant where I hid the package..
            Albert Tsai: We already went over that.
            Albert Tsai: I'm not hiding anything. Stop making things up. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後傾倒播) >>
            Thought: His eyes are still wandering. Now I'm sure.
            Thought: He's planning something...
        ->How did you hide the package?
            <<Set($WhereDidYouHideIt, -1)>>
            <<#GoTo(@你是怎麼藏貨的？)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->How did you hide the package?
    Thought: His eyes wandered. I've seen that expression before.
    Thought: He feels guilty, but why?
    <<@你是怎麼藏貨的？>>
    Albert Tsai: That...
    Albert Tsai: Like we always do.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Dodging the question?
        Albert Tsai: No, what's there to dodge? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >>
        Albert Tsai: I was just surprised that you were asking about it. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >>
        Albert Tsai: I told you, it's how we've been doing it this whole time. You know what I mean.
        <<#GoTo(@平常的做法給他講明白)>>
    ->How have we been doing it?
        Albert Tsai: ...
        <<@平常的做法給他講明白>>
        Albert Tsai: After receiving the goods, we usually send them by drone to a safe location.;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >>

        <<#Simple(3)>>
        ->So where did you hide the package? ($WhereDidYouHideIt);//預設1，但是如果走過藏在哪路線就要改成-1
            Albert Tsai: I can't answer that.
            Albert Tsai: Your rules.
            <<#GoTo(@問這個不太好)>>
        ->...($WhereDidYouHideIt)
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
 
Albert Tsai: Okay, I don't think there's anything seriously wrong with my head.
Albert Tsai: ...
Albert Tsai: But since we're on the subject, I have a question. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_比一) >>
Albert Tsai: You once told Alex a story when you were drunk.
Albert Tsai: It was about how you sold information to the cops to get one of our guys out of jail. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >>
Thought: That's not something to boast about. I should drink less.

Thought: It can as long as you have something to give them. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >>

<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Of course
    Albert Tsai: I see. That's good to know. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >>
    Thought: Good to know?
    <<#Simple(4)>>
    ->Why would it be good to know?
        <<#GoTo(@你問這個是再問啥鬼)>>
    ->Why are you asking about this?
        <<#GoTo(@你問這個是再問啥鬼)>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>

    <<#GoTo(@做這種事需要人脈喔！)>>

    <<@你問這個是再問啥鬼>>
    Albert Tsai: N-nothing.
    Albert Tsai: I'm just curious.
    <<@做這種事需要人脈喔！>>
    <<#Simple(4)>>

        <<Set($MustKnowSomeCops, 0)>>

        Albert Tsai: Have you heard of someone succeeding without them?
        Thought: Without connections, you'd just be turning yourself in. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_摸頭倒播) >>
        Thought: Wait, this kid...
        <<#Simple(99999)>>

            Albert Tsai: Is that so...

        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
 
 
Albert Tsai: Oh right! The door!

        Albert Tsai: ...the cops might want to make sure we stay put. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬頭) >>
        Albert Tsai: ...
        Albert Tsai: This also means that we've already been arrested. We're being watched. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬頭倒播) >>
        Albert Tsai: They locked the doors, revoked control access...
        Albert Tsai: It's the only explanation I've got. What do you think?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Maybe they just don't want patients to leave on their own.
            Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看) >>
            Albert Tsai: You think they'd do all this just to stop us from wandering out of our room?
            Albert Tsai: I'm not convinced. This seems excessive. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_右看倒播) >>
            Albert Tsai: The nurse wouldn't be able to open the door with her own password.
            <<#Simple(4) >>
            ->The staff use ID cards to open doors.
                Albert Tsai: The...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考) >>
                Albert Tsai: You're right, but...
                Albert Tsai: ...Okay, maybe I'm just getting spooked over nothing.
                Albert Tsai: We need more information. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭思考倒播) >>
                Albert Tsai: A lot of time has passed since we woke up. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >>
                Albert Tsai: If we were wanted men, the staff would have showed up. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >>
                Albert Tsai: Either that, or the police. No one's appeared yet.
                Albert Tsai: This might be our lucky day. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >>
                Albert Tsai: We're just two citizens staying at the hospital due to our accident.
                Albert Tsai: In that case, I'm only worried about Alex now.
                Albert Tsai: I wonder how he's doing on his own... ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭) >>
                Albert Tsai: I'm not sure if that monitor can show his status. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭倒播) >>
                <<#If($ProjectorDidClose = false)>>
                <<#GoTo(@脫身話題發現有開軌道顯示器)>>
                <<#EndIf>>
                <<#GoTo(@沒警察，可以跟我說吧？)>>
            ->I guess you've got a point.
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple >>
            Albert Tsai: That means I was right...
            Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >>
            Albert Tsai: We need to face the facts.
            Albert Tsai: <color=#F36B6C> We've already been arrested</color> . ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >>
            Albert Tsai: Once the cops find out we're awake, they'll be in here to do all sorts of questioning. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >>
            Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >>
            Albert Tsai: What should we do now?
            <<#GoTo(@弟弟脫身話題)>>
        ->You're right, we've probably already been caught.
            Albert Tsai: ...
            Albert Tsai: And... that's it? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >>
            Albert Tsai: We'll get locked up just like that?
            Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >>
            Albert Tsai: What should we do now?
            <<#GoTo(@弟弟脫身話題)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->It seems to be malfunctioning.
        <<@似乎是有某種故障>>
        Albert Tsai: A malfunction?
        Albert Tsai: Why now?
        Albert Tsai: Ahhhhhh! ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後躺) >>
        Albert Tsai: Shit! We were this close. THIS close!
        Albert Tsai: You even had the password!
        Albert Tsai: And you deal with it like it's nothing? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_後躺倒播) >>
        Albert Tsai: We got so close with the password but now...
        Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >>
        Albert Tsai: Can you try it again? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >>
        Albert Tsai: Let me take a closer look. I might be able to fix it. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >>
        Albert Tsai: How about it? Give it another try? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Yeah, okay.
            Albert Tsai: Good. I'll leave it to you, then. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >>
            <<Set($TryMachineAgain, true) >> ;<<#End>>
            //玩家解除對話，然後可以跟浮顯器互動，浮顯器已經是密碼打開的狀態。 再次互動選取開門，會跳出錯誤提示。
            //啊翰會鼓勵繼續操作，如果繼續操作會跳出提示說請工作人員專心處理正職(各種威脅，盡量讓玩家看出來)。
            //還一直操作最後會直接死機。
            //如果之前沒打開過浮顯器會直接顯示已鎖定
        ->There's no need.
            Albert Tsai: Come on. Let me see what this malfunction is. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >>
            Albert Tsai: It can't be too much of a hassle.
            Albert Tsai: Why not give it another try? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >>
            <<#Simple(6)>>
            ->Yeah, okay.
                Albert Tsai: Thanks. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >>
                <<Set($TryMachineAgain, true) >> ;<<#End>>
            ->I said there's no need.
                Albert Tsai: ...
                Albert Tsai: Okay, I get it...
                <<#GoTo(@我就說沒必要了咩)>>
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Albert Tsai: Who knows? I might be able to find something!
            Albert Tsai: I might be able to... Uh...
            Albert Tsai: Ah, forget it... Even if we tried again...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >>
            Albert Tsai: If you couldn't figure it out, I don't think I'd be able to. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >>
            <<@我就說沒必要了咩>>
            Albert Tsai: If only my brother were here. He'd know what to do.
            Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >>
            Albert Tsai: He should be fine, right?
            Albert Tsai: You did say his info is shown on the display...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >>

title: 說可以開門
body:
<<@說可以開門>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Not yet.
    Albert Tsai: Hm?
    Albert Tsai: Why?
    <<@可以開門但還沒出去>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->I wanted to wait for you to wake up.
        Albert Tsai: What? You should have just woken me up! ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手) >>
        Albert Tsai: Or you could have gone out by yourself. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬右手倒播) >>
        <<#Simple(4)>>
        ->I didn't want to leave you alone.
            Albert Tsai: Oh...
            Albert Tsai: Sorry. I didn't know you cared about me so much. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->I was worried there might be cops outside.
        Albert Tsai: That...
        Albert Tsai: Did you see something? Otherwise why are you being so cautious? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->I heard them talking.
            <<@感覺外面有條子喔>>
            Albert Tsai: Really?
            Albert Tsai: ...
            Albert Tsai: Then it's over. We're not gonna be able to escape.
            Albert Tsai: ...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >>
            <<#GoTo(@有警察要準備談條件了)>>
        ->I thought I'd lay low for a while, didn't want to attract attention.
            Albert Tsai: Fuck, you scared me. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >>
            Albert Tsai: I thought you found out there are cops guarding this door or something.
            <<@就直覺而已>>
            Albert Tsai: Wait, you just wanted to lay low for a while? Not even wanting to find out what's outside this door?
            Albert Tsai: Aren't you laying a little bit... too low?
            <<#Simple(4)>>
            ->I couldn't leave you here by yourself.
                Albert Tsai: Ha...;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >>
                Albert Tsai: Sorry. I appreciate it. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >>
            ->...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Yeah.
    Albert Tsai: So?
    Albert Tsai: Are there any cops outside? Have we actually been caught?
    <<@有開門也有出去一般>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->The cops are outside, but don't panic.
        Albert Tsai: What?! ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >>
        Albert Tsai: You saw them? Did you actually talk to them? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾抬手) >>
        Albert Tsai: Why didn't you tell me earlier! ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾抬手倒播) >>
        Albert Tsai: Does this mean we won't get arrested? But how...?
        Albert Tsai: What exactly is our situation now? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >>
        <<#GoTo(@有警察要準備談條件了)>>
    ->No cops. Don't worry.
        Albert Tsai: Really? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾) >>
        Albert Tsai: Great! I thought we were toast...
        Albert Tsai: So we're just here because of our little accident.
        Albert Tsai: Phew... That's a relief. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_前傾倒播) >>
        Albert Tsai: Well, since that's the case, I want to go see Alex...
        <<@我想先去看我弟囉嚕囉>>
        <<#Simple(3)>>
        ->Wait.
            Albert Tsai: Hm? What?
            <<#Simple(99999)>> 
            ->You can't walk just yet.
                Albert Tsai: That's okay, I'll endure. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >>
                <<Set($AhanGetOffBed, 1)>>
                Albert Tsai: Yep... I think I'll manage.
                Albert Tsai: Well, I'm off.
                <<Set($ResultOfAhan, 5)>> ;<<#End>>
            ->If you go now, you'll interfere with his treatment.
                Albert Tsai: He's in the middle of treatment?
                Albert Tsai: Did you manage to go see him?
                Albert Tsai: I thought he was just resting like us. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭) >>
                Albert Tsai: ...
                Albert Tsai: Are his injuries more severe than mine?;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_轉頭倒播) >>
                <<#Simple(4)>>
                ->Don't worry, it's just some simple rehabilitation.
                    Albert Tsai: Phew... That's good.;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕) >>
                    Albert Tsai: You scared me there for a moment, hahaha. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_低頭輕輕倒播) >>
                ->Yeah, it looked pretty severe.
                    Albert Tsai: Is that so...
                <<#EndSimple>>
                Albert Tsai: ...
                Albert Tsai: I guess I'll have to wait...
                Albert Tsai: I should just stay here then.
                Albert Tsai: Hm? Oh yeah, I wonder what the monitor says about Alex's status.
                <<#GoTo(@脫身話題發現有開軌道顯示器)>>
            <<#EndSimple>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        <<Set($AhanGetOffBed, 1)>>
        Albert Tsai: Urgh... My legs still hurt...
        Albert Tsai: Well, I'm off.
        <<Set($ResultOfAhan, 5)>> ;<<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple >>
 
Albert Tsai: So... are you heading out now? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手) >>
Albert Tsai: Can't find out what our situation is without going out, right? ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬左手倒播) >>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->No need. We're safe in here.
    Albert Tsai: What? Why are you so sure?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->A nurse came in earlier but she didn't treat us like criminals.
        Albert Tsai: Oh yeah, didn't think about that...
        Albert Tsai: Wait, you should have told me about this earlier! ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手) >>
        Albert Tsai: That's great news! I've been worried this whole time. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_抬雙手倒播) >>
        Albert Tsai: It's been a while since the chase, too. I can feel a bit relieved now.
        Albert Tsai: If they lost our trail, it's probably gonna take them some time to catch up with us.
        Albert Tsai: Since we're safe, I want to go see Alex.
        <<#GoTo(@我想先去看我弟囉嚕囉)>>
    ->We should be optimistic about our situation.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Albert Tsai: We don't need to be optimistic. Let's just go out and take a look.
    <<Set($AhanGetOffBed, 1)>>
    Albert Tsai: ...
    Albert Tsai: We...
    <<Set($ResultOfAhan, 5)>> ;<<#End>>
->Okay, let's go.
    <<@好啊我們走吧一般>>
    Albert Tsai: No problem. ;<< Play(蔡明翰, MBU_阿翰_點頭) >>
    <<Set($AhanGetOffBed, 1)>>
    Albert Tsai: Urgh... My legs still hurt.
    Albert Tsai: We...
    <<Set($ResultOfAhan, 5)>> ;<<#End>>
<<#EndSimple>>

body:

Calibrator: ...

Augmentor: ...
Augmentor: Understood.
Calibrator: One more thing...

Augmentor: Where?

Augmentor: ...
Augmentor: Understood. ;<< Play (重構者, MBU_實驗人員B_轉頭講話倒播)>>
<< Set ($BWalkOut, true) >> 
Calibrator: ...
Calibrator: Now that you're aware of your... defects, M.B.U.

    Calibrator: We decide who you can control. ;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_舉手倒播)>>

        Calibrator: As long as you're in control, it won't pose any problems.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Modified?

    Calibrator: ...Necessary to curb and control your abilities. ;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_抱胸倒播)>>

->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Calibrator: Do you understand?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes. I understand.

->I don't understand.
    Calibrator: Their package was initially smuggled out of this facility.
    Calibrator: I need you to ask them <color=#c2a67e>where they hid it</color>. 
    Calibrator: That's all.
<<#EndSimple>>
 
<<#If($ProjectorDidClose = true)>>
Calibrator: Also...
Calibrator: You turned off the display by the window. ;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_歪頭)>>

<<#EndSimple>>

Calibrator: ...;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_轉頭講話)>>
Calibrator: I'm showing you Albert Tsai's data here.
Calibrator: As you can see, 80% of his organs suffered severe failure after the accident. ;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_轉頭舉手)>>
Calibrator: He's alive purely due to Section 13's regenerative technology.
Calibrator: In short, it took some effort for us to keep him alive. ;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_轉頭舉手倒播)>>
Calibrator: I will not let that effort go to waste.
Calibrator: I have two options to choose from.;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_轉回正面)>>
Calibrator: One, I let you do your work, and obtain the information I need. ;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_比一)>>

Calibrator: I still have expectations for you, even if you are defective. ;<< Play (校準者, MBU_實驗人員A_比二倒播)>>
Calibrator: Listen, just get me the coordinates. I don't care how you do it.
Calibrator: I will be observing you. If anything goes wrong, I will end this assignment.
<<#Simple(5)>>
->What counts as something going wrong?
    Calibrator: If the target leaves, or if he becomes overly emotional.
    Calibrator: I can also run out of patience.

    Calibrator: That is not information you need to know.
    Calibrator: It will happen if the target leaves, or becomes overly emotional.

->...
<<#EndSimple>>
